title: Identify and collect marine life
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Identify and collect marine life demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to identify and collect marine life

pcs.text: Select resources required for identifying collected marine life
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select resources required for identifying collected marine life?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select resources required for identifying collected marine life.

pcs.text: Identify and select equipment and materials required for collection, transport, preservation and storage of marine life
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and select equipment and materials required for collection, transport, preservation and storage of marine life?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and select equipment and materials required for collection, transport, preservation and storage of marine life.

pcs.text: Identify sources of expertise and advice
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify sources of expertise and advice?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify sources of expertise and advice.

pcs.text: Determine location/s and timing for collection and identification
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine location/s and timing for collection and identification?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine location/s and timing for collection and identification.

pcs.text: Identify and comply with licences and permits required for collecting marine wildlife
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and comply with licences and permits required for collecting marine wildlife?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and comply with licences and permits required for collecting marine wildlife.

pcs.text: Follow workplace procedure for identification, collection and storage of marine specimens
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Follow workplace procedure for identification, collection and storage of marine specimens?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Follow workplace procedure for identification, collection and storage of marine specimens.

pcs.text: Identify health, safety and environmental hazards, assess the risks and implement controls according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify health, safety and environmental hazards, assess the risks and implement controls according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify health, safety and environmental hazards, assess the risks and implement controls according to workplace procedures.

elements.title: Identify, gather and preserve marine specimens

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collect specimens for preservation, minimising environmental impact according to workplace procedures and ethical animal welfare practices.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement biosecurity procedures.

pcs.text: Transport small, neritic marine specimens according to workplace and ethical procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Transport small, neritic marine specimens according to workplace and ethical procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Transport small, neritic marine specimens according to workplace and ethical procedures.

pcs.text: Preserve small, neritic marine specimens according to workplace preservation procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Preserve small, neritic marine specimens according to workplace preservation procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Preserve small, neritic marine specimens according to workplace preservation procedures.

pcs.text: Confirm identification with supervisor or other expert
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm identification with supervisor or other expert?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm identification with supervisor or other expert.
